---
title: "Events"
description-meta: "Events organized or co-organized by the Sustainability Lab, IIT Gandhinagar — including the ACM India Summer School on AI for Social Good and MEDFUSE."
---

In this page, we include the events that we have organized or co-organized.

## 2025
ACM India Summer School on AI for Social Good
Link: [ACM India Summer School 2025](https://sustainability-lab.github.io/acm-summer-2025/)
![ACM India Summer School 2025 on AI for Social Good — event poster](../images/events/acm-summer-2025.png){loading="lazy"}

## 2023

MEDFUSE: Medicine, Engineering, and Data Fusion for Health

![MEDFUSE: Medicine, Engineering, and Data Fusion for Health — event poster](../images/events/MEDFUSE_NEW.png){loading="lazy"}
